title: rubus chartaceus
intro: Rubus chartaceus, also known as the paper raspberry or paper bramble, is a species of bramble native to eastern Australia. The medicinal properties of Rubus chartaceus include its use as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Rubus chartaceus can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and has also been used in traditional medicine to make poultices and topical creams for wound healing and skin irritations.
